summary: Iteration 62 testing completed. All features tested: 11 tabs visible in Items & Inventory page, date range filters + CSV/Print export for all required tabs, category filters for Stock Status, new Item Report and Op/Cl Report tabs, and doctor add bug fix verified. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed ESLint error in StockManagement.jsx - useMemo was called conditionally after early return (line 388)
Added ItemReportTab and OpeningClosingReportTab imports to Items.jsx
Added tab triggers and content for Item Report and Op/Cl Report tabs in Items.jsx
Changed TabsList from grid to flex-wrap to accommodate 11 tabs
All 11 tabs now visible: Products, Stock Status, Opening Bal., Purchases, Sales Return, Stock Issue, Item Ledger, User Ledger, Item Report, Op/Cl Report, Suppliers
Stock Status tab has Main Category filter dropdown, CSV and Print export buttons
Purchase, Sales Return, Stock Issue tabs have date range filters with Week/Month/Year presets and CSV/Print buttons
Item Ledger tab has item select dropdown and date range filter, export buttons appear after selecting item
User Ledger tab has search input and date range filter with presets
Item Report tab shows item movement table with Opening/Purchase/Sales/Closing columns, totals row, date filters and export buttons
Op/Cl Report tab shows Opening Stock/Closing Stock/Difference table with date filters and export buttons
Doctor add form shows Name and Phone as required (*), Reg. No and Email as optional (no asterisk)
Backend API POST /api/doctors accepts only name and phone without reg_no/email - bug fix verified
seed_data_creation: Test doctors created and cleaned up during backend testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 62 features all working. Items & Inventory page now has 11 tabs including new Item Report and Op/Cl Report tabs. All tabs have date range filters with Week/Month/Year presets and CSV/Print export buttons. Stock Status tab has Main Category filter. Doctor add bug fixed - reg_no and email are now optional.
